top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Rise as Chipmaker Rebound Overshadows Iran War
top_signals.summary: US stock futures advanced on Tuesday as a rebound in chipmakers at the center of the artificial-intelligence trade overshadowed the re-escalation in the US-Iran war.

top_signals.title: Why Ian Callum’s Jaguar XJ220 is only half revealed
top_signals.summary: Ian Callum has redesigned the Jaguar XJ220 but shown only half of it. Here’s what we know about the reworked supercar, and why teasing it works so well.
